allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'node.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, CreationDate, @{n='Cmd';e={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(120, $_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -Wrap)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $r.StatusCode; if \($r.Content -match '목차 탐험'\) { 'MATHGAME OK' } else { 'DIFFERENT APP' } } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; $r.StatusCode; if \($r.Content -match 'one-is-prime-quiz-3d|three'\) { 'BUNDLE REFERENCES PRESENT' } else { 'no direct reference in HTML \(client chunk\)' })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess; "$\($p.Id\) $\($p.ProcessName\) started $\($p.StartTime\)"; try { \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($p.Id\)"\).CommandLine } catch {} } | Select-Object -Unique)
